content.en:
Golden real sea.

One of the newly discovered treasures in the Sea of Dimensions, this place is far away from the multidimensional territory, but after the Void Heaven Palace's Void Heaven Roulette was activated, a group of powerhouses at the peak of the Nine Realms were teleported here.

Of course, each Nine Realms pinnacle paid some contribution points.

After descending near the Golden True Sea, many of the Nine Realms peak powerhouses of the Void Heaven Sect fled into the Golden True Sea one after another.

Ye Tian was also separated from the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

......

The Golden True Sea is very small from the outside world, and it can't be seen from a little distance, but after entering the Golden True Sea, it is found that the Golden True Sea has its own dimensional void inside, and the scope is extremely vast.

"I'm afraid that there are a lot of Nine Realms peak powerhouses who have entered the Golden True Sea, but now the news has not been spread, and many powerhouses don't know about it yet. The Nine Realms peak powerhouses such as the Void Immortal Realm Lord also came to collect some resources "Three Two Zeros" at the beginning, and they would not stay here. In the back, there will be more strong people here, and the more dangerous it will be!"

Ye Tian was not afraid of danger, he was not afraid of danger, he had no big deal to lose one or two replica bodies.

As for wanting to kill all his clones in the air, I am afraid that there are not many of them who can do it at the peak of the Nine Realms at present.

Therefore, Ye Tian was the least panicked.

Immediately, he condensed another replica body, letting this replica body stay at the edge of the Golden True Sea, while the other replica body went deep into the Golden True Sea to find resources.

......

"This is a multi-dimensional stone, in the multi-dimensional territory, this kind of treasure is very precious, but there are so many of them here!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had discovered it on an island in the Golden True Sea, and so many multi-dimensional Xuanshi stones were simply an unimaginable wealth for those powerhouses of the Eight Realms!

"It's no wonder that the ultimate forces like the Void Heaven Palace are too lazy to compete with those forces in the multidimensional territory for any resources, and they are only a very small number of resources, and some of the ninth realms in the Void Heaven Palace will come to compete for one or two, but they will not take all of them. It is true that the Void Heaven Palace is really too rich, just go to the Dimensional Sea, as long as you come back alive, you can harvest the wealth accumulation that far surpasses the countless years of a top force!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He took the multidimensional dark stones and moved on.

A treasure like the Golden True Sea was discovered not long ago, even if he was not the first batch of Nine Realms peak powerhouses to come, he could still easily find a large number of resources.

Soon.

He has obtained a large number of resources, many of which are of great help to the Nine Realms, most of which are resources that can improve the cultivation of the Nine Realms, and some can help the Nine Realms comprehend the supreme dimensional rules, and the effect is quite good.

After obtaining a large amount of resources, Ye Tian sent these resources back to the first replica body.

In this case, if there is really some accident in the core area of the Golden True Sea, resulting in the fall of the replica body, there will be no big loss.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered another unfamiliar Nine Realms peak powerhouse, the aura on the other party's body was very unfamiliar, and he was definitely not a powerhouse in the multidimensional realm.

If it were the Nine Realms peak powerhouses of the other eight ultimate forces in the multidimensional territory, everyone might still avoid them, but the unfamiliar Nine Realms peak powerhouses would have to be careful with each other.

Ye Tian glanced at each other and didn't make a move, obviously he hadn't touched a precious treasure yet, and it wasn't cost-effective for him to do anything to each other.

However.

After another period of time, Ye Tian discovered a Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing.

The Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing is purple-golden, emitting a strong light, and even causing the supreme dimensional rules to vibrate, which is easy to identify.

Ye Tian had just taken this Heavenly Rebellion Xuanjing, and a figure came across the dimensional void, and it was another existence at the peak of the Nine Realms.

"Hand over the !!!! Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing"

Although the other party came late, he also sensed the breath of the Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing, and naturally knew that Ye Tian had taken it, and he was unwilling to let Ye Tian leave.

Ye Tian is too lazy to talk nonsense, this situation can only be fought for one time.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian cast the Tianji Killing Move, quickly killing this Nine Realms peak powerhouse, and then cast the Tianwei Killing Move, colliding with the other party.

This existence at the peak of the Ninth Realm is not weak at all, he has mastered the two ultimate dimensional killing moves, and his physical strength is not bad at all.

However.

Just when Ye Tian showed the third ultimate dimensional killing trick domain field, the other party's face changed drastically.

When the Strange Domain Field came, the opponent's soul will was instantly suppressed, resulting in his own strength not being able to exert himself, and the soul will had to fight against the Strange Domain Field.

Burst!!!!

Tianwei's killing move directly cut off the opponent's arm, making it impossible for the opponent to recover 0..

At this time.

The other party began to run away, and a variety of hole card tricks were used to quickly escape.

Ye Tian once again unleashed an Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move, crossing the dimensional void to bombard the opponent's soul will.

When Ye Tian caught up with the other party, the other party's soul will had already shattered, and he was trying to condense, and he was immediately killed by Ye Tian's Tianwei killing move.

Then, Ye Tian took all the other party's harvest and made a big profit.

......

"Poof!"

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm dragged her seriously injured body and escaped from the Golden True Sea, but she was in a good mood, because she had gained a lot, although she did not obtain the Heavenly Reverse Xuanjing, but she had gained other good things.

"It's time to leave, hide first to recover from your injuries, and then contact the other companions to return to the Void Heaven Palace. "

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm secretly said.

It's not just the Void Immortal Realm Lord who has left, but many of the weaker Nine Realm peak powerhouses have also left, and most of them have only mastered one Ultimate Dimension killing move, where do they dare to continue to stay.

Nowadays, there are more and more powerhouses in the Golden True Sea, and there will even be some Nine Realm peak powerhouses who have mastered five or even six ultimate dimensional killing moves, and the Nine Realms peak who has only mastered one ultimate dimensional killing move will definitely be killed in one move.

As time passed, more and more strong people left.

......

Void Heaven Palace 1.1.

The Void Immortal Realm Lord and they are back, and one of Ye Tian's replica bodies is also back, his replica body has too many treasures, so he naturally brings it back first.

Otherwise, he still has the copy body to stay in the Golden True Sea, and he can continue to send the copy body back at any time.

And as soon as he came back, he got a message from the Void Immortal Realm Lord: "The Ten Patrol Realm Lord has fallen!"

"Ten Patrol Realm Lords?"

Ye Tian knew about this realm master at the peak of the Nine Realms, but he didn't know much, he only knew that the other party was the same as the Void Immortal Realm Lord, and he was also a powerhouse who had mastered an ultimate dimensional killing move.

"It's not just the Ten Patrol Realm Lords, but the other eight Ultimate Forces have also fallen to the Nine Realms Peak Powerhouse who has mastered the Ultimate Dimension killing moves, this time the Golden True Sea is too dangerous!" said the Void Immortal Realm Lord.

After all, she almost fell.
